Client.title: Client
Client.description: DREEM SMS Portal Client Account synced database record

username.description: Uniquely identifying username of the client user account

name.description: Full display name of the client user

email.description: Contact email address of the client

is_active.description: Flag to mark if client is active or suspended

balance.description: Remaining account balance in credits for sending SMS

phone.description: Phone number with international country code

last_login.description: Timestamp of the last login session

clients/{clientId}.description: Primary document path for client accounts in Firebase Firestore
